sentiment.reasoning: A $400M contract is a significant revenue driver that will positively impact financial results over the coming months.

headlines.headline: Kelvos Resources recalls products in supply chain optimization line due to quality concerns

sentiment.reasoning: Completing a facility upgrade is an operational milestone that is generally expected and has limited immediate market impact.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
